name: FATCA Withholding Exception for Low-Risk Entities

eligibility.description: Beneficial owner must be a foreign government, international organization, foreign central bank, or a class of persons identified by the Secretary as posing a low risk of tax evasion.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts payments to specific foreign entities from the 30% FATCA withholding tax.
